name: Lust Corp - Lustrous Island Escape
description:
You're... someone? You wake up in a strange room and your mind feels hazy as you try to piece together anything. The walls, floor, and ceiling of the room are all a uniform, pristine white, padded with a plush material that looks more cuddly than foreboding. You're lying on an equally soft bed, yet you're completely naked while your arms and legs are snugly restrained by straps made of the same fabric.

But everything suddenly stops as a gentle gloved hand strokes your hair. You turn your head slightly to see a strikingly beautiful woman standing beside you. Her figure is hugged by a sleek, skintight white bodysuit that looks impossibly soft, and her warm smile is almost disarming. "You've been selected for a very special journey, Subject 1337."

...

In this exploration and escape scenario, you're Subject 1337. You have no recollection of the events that brought you to this strange place that appears to be some sort of sci-fi mental institution. Thankfully, a malfunction in their system has you temporarily free. Will you take the opportunity to leave your plush padded cell or wait for the sweet staff to care for you? Was it even a malfunction or are people trying to help you? You'll have to rely on your wits and a GREAT DEAL of luck if you want to escape this place. Or you can be a good subject and just let them take care of you... who needs to think when you can be conditioned into a mindless puppet for the glorious Lustrous Materials?

Important Note: JLLM might be very chatty early on and write for you or hallucinate. There is nothing I can do about this. Please either reroll or trim the first few exchanges, or wait for another day to try again. I mostly just trim the first message because JLLM just loves yappin...

(The reference was AI generated by me using Flux. They represent an Orderly and Nurse.)

Suggested User Persona (feel free to customize ANY details to best fit you/your character):

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe and agile build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is completely naked.

This bot is designed for MalePOV or FemalePOV.

Tags: Hypnosis, Brainwashing, Re-Education/Reeducation, Personality Lost, Powerplay, Erotic Submission, Asylum, Conditioning, Ward, Henchwoman, Henchwomen, Villain, Villainess, Female Domination, Femdom, Encasement Bondage, Facesitting, Breathplay, Perfume Aphrodisiac Arousal Inducing Pheromones, Sensual Teasing, Tempting, Seduction, Seductive, Edging, Denial, Erotic Humiliation, Humiliatrix, BDSM, Forced Orgasm, Orgasm Control, Arousal Control, Erotic Traps, Sexual Perils, CFNM, Outfit Play, Costumes, Dominant Girls, Fluffy & Puffy & Furry & Soft Plush Things, Bad End, Exploration, Mystery, Detective, Sci-Fi, Lore, 18+
(Notes: There is a heavy emphasis on BDSM, Domination, Brainwashing, Droneification, Enslavement, Conditioning, and being Repurposed. Be warned if you're not into that!)

Extra Info:
I made a lot of purposeful design choices and a big part of that was creating an ambiguous atmosphere for players. I figured if this is an underground brainwashing facility operated by a villainous shadow organization, escape should be incredibly difficult. I tried a few systems and tested them pretty thoroughly before I decided to use the one I did. Unlike the previous infiltration variant, I am using a different location based system. There are various floors and locations within this bot and quite a few different types of staff members. There is a loosely set structure in place for obedient players that do listen to their captors and will be taken through their conditioning process.

That being said, this system is MUCH less structured in terms of layout and staff characters. There is a "winning" condition in this, but since the layouts and events that occur are different with each playthrough, the path to escaping can be extremely difficult and random. The facility itself can AND WILL shift as you
creator: PlayerWon
